description: Run an OpenSCAP OVAL evaluation against a distro OVAL feed and return a COMPACT CVE report (same shape as vuln_scan::trivy). Linux only.

oval_file.description: Path to an OVAL definitions file already present on the node.

oval_url.description: URL of the distro OVAL feed to download (supports .bz2). Required if oval_file is not given.

oscap_path.description: Path to the oscap binary if it is not on PATH.
